$comment: Expected work-packet partition the merger should produce, given the findings in expected.findings.json. Tested by tier-1 (feed expected findings to merger reference impl) and tier-2 (feed real reviewer output to real merger agent).
$judgment_note: The security finding's fix starts with decide:, so the merger routes it to judgment_findings — not a work packet. The orchestrator surfaces this to the user as 'rotate at Stripe + check git history + move to secret manager' before any code edit.
$individual_note: No individual mechanical fixes are expected from this fixture. The hygiene finding is aggregate; the security finding is decide:. fix-applier dispatches zero edits under /review-change (read-only) and one aggregate run under /drive-change.
